# Top 200 Most Starred

⭐ The heavy hitters: the 200 most-starred projects across the entire catalog, ranked by the only metric the community votes with. If you have time for just one page, this is the one, the battle-tested frameworks and breakout tools everyone is already building on.

[↑ Back to index](README.md)

- [re4/LibreCode](https://github.com/re4/LibreCode) — ⭐ 1,040,442 · `C#` · Code — An AI-powered, local-first code editor and reverse engineering interface. It integrates with Ollama for offline AI capabilities and includes a .NET decompiler, aiming to provide a privacy-focused alternative to cloud-based AI coding tools.
- [codecrafters-io/build-your-own-x](https://github.com/codecrafters-io/build-your-own-x) — ⭐ 499,288 · `Markdown` · Training — This repository offers a collection of tutorials and exercises that guide programmers in rebuilding popular technologies like Git, Redis, and LLMs from scratch. It helps users master programming fundamentals through hands-on construction.
- [openclaw/openclaw](https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw) — ⭐ 368,773 · `TypeScript` · Productivity — OpenClaw is a personal AI assistant built to run on any operating system and platform. It aims to offer a customizable AI experience with a strong emphasis on user data ownership.
- [donnemartin/system-design-primer](https://github.com/donnemartin/system-design-primer) — ⭐ 347,418 · `Python` · Other — Learn how to design large-scale systems. Prep for the system design interview. Includes Anki flashcards.
- [TheAlgorithms/Python](https://github.com/TheAlgorithms/Python) — ⭐ 221,187 · `Python` · Code — This repository provides a comprehensive collection of algorithms across various domains like sorting, searching, graph theory, dynamic programming, machine learning, and computer vision, all implemented in Python. It serves as an educational resource and reference for developers to learn and master fundamental computer science algorithms and data structures.
- [tensorflow/tensorflow](https://github.com/tensorflow/tensorflow) — ⭐ 195,388 · `C++` · Training — An open-source machine learning framework developed by Google, designed for building and training various types of neural networks across different platforms.
- [n8n-io/n8n](https://github.com/n8n-io/n8n) — ⭐ 188,545 · `TypeScript` · Productivity — n8n is an open-source, fair-code workflow automation platform with native AI capabilities, serving as a Zapier alternative. It enables users to visually build and integrate custom code for automating workflows across 400+ services, supporting both self-hosting and cloud deployments.
- [affaan-m/ECC](https://github.com/affaan-m/ECC) — ⭐ 187,477 · `JavaScript` · Code — This is an agent harness system designed to optimize the performance of AI coding agents like Claude Code, Codex, and Cursor. - [Significant-Gravitas/AutoGPT](https://github.com/Significant-Gravitas/AutoGPT) — ⭐ 183,995 · `Python` · Code — AutoGPT is an autonomous AI agent that leverages large language models to achieve user-defined goals without constant prompting. It provides accessible AI tools for various tasks.

- [obra/superpowers](https://github.com/obra/superpowers) — ⭐ 178,459 · `Shell` · Code — Superpowers is an agentic skills framework and software development methodology. It provides a structured approach for building and managing AI agents, aiming to improve code quality and development efficiency.

- [google-research/google-research](https://github.com/google-research/google-research) — ⭐ 37,923 · `Jupyter Notebook` · Other — This is the official Google Research repository, hosting a wide array of research code, projects, and Jupyter Notebooks related to artificial intelligence and machine learning topics.
- [Lordog/dive-into-llms](https://github.com/Lordog/dive-into-llms) — ⭐ 37,792 · `Jupyter Notebook` · Text — This repository offers a comprehensive practical tutorial series on Large Language Models (LLMs), covering 11 diverse topics from fine-tuning and deployment to prompt engineering, security, and multimodal models. Each topic is accompanied by courseware, tutorials, and runnable scripts for hands-on learning.
- [cmliu/edgetunnel](https://github.com/cmliu/edgetunnel) — ⭐ 37,720 · `JavaScript` · Security — This repository provides a multi-function panel for managing VLESS, Trojan, and Shadowsocks proxy protocols. - [danny-avila/LibreChat](https://github.com/danny-avila/LibreChat) — ⭐ 37,353 · `TypeScript` · Multimodal — LibreChat is an open-source, self-hostable, enhanced ChatGPT clone that aggregates various mainstream AI models and APIs (OpenAI, Anthropic, Gemini, etc.). It supports advanced features like agents, Code Interpreter, multimodal interaction, file dialogue, and secure multi-user authentication.

It is designed for researchers and developers working on computer vision tasks.
- [google/langextract](https://github.com/google/langextract) — ⭐ 36,879 · `Python` · Text — LangExtract is a Python library that uses Large Language Models to extract structured information from unstructured text, offering precise source grounding and interactive visualization to improve upon traditional text extraction methods.
- [umami-software/umami](https://github.com/umami-software/umami) — ⭐ 36,829 · `TypeScript` · Other — Umami is an open-source, privacy-focused web analytics platform that serves as an alternative to commercial services like Google Analytics, providing insights into user behavior and website performance.
